title: NEEDLE EXCHANGE - 211info
text: LA GRANDE NEEDLE EXCHANGE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides supplies and education for safer drug use, including syringe exchange, disposal, and testing for HIV. Offers referrals for additional services, including detox and recovery programs. 2102 Cove Avenue La Grande, OR 97850 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-3pm Email (541) 612-4028 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 612-4028 Toll-free (844) 489-3119 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, interpretation or signing by arrangement AREA SERVED: Baker, Gilliam, Grant, Harney, Hood River, Malheur, Morrow, Sherman, Umatilla, Union, Wallowa, Wasco, and Wheeler Counties SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 9am-3pm Services: HIV Testing Needle Exchange and Injection Supplies Other Services Offered At This Location: DISASTER SERVICES - CRISIS AND EMERGENCY PREPAREDNESS INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - HIV COMMUNITY SERVICES INFORMATION SERVICES - INFORMATION SERVICES PUBLIC ASSISTANCE PROGRAMS - TRANSITION SERVICES REHABILITATION/HABILITATION SERVICES - CENTERS FOR INDEPENDENT LIVING If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. LA GRANDE
